tasks.title: Add tunnel track type to constants and palette
tasks.description: Add 'tunnel' to TRACK_TYPES array, BASE_CONNECTIONS (N-S like straight), and palette HTML. Tunnel is a track piece, not scenery.
changes: Add 'tunnel' to TRACK_TYPES array
Add BASE_CONNECTIONS.tunnel = ['N', 'S']
Add tunnel palette item in sidebar HTML between bridge and station
Update SCENERY_TYPES check — tunnel should NOT be in scenery

tasks.title: Create tunnel SVG rendering
tasks.description: Mountain/hill shape with dark oval tunnel opening. Top-down view showing a mound with dark entrance/exit on connected edges.
changes: Add 'tunnel' case in createTrackSVG() function
SVG: Green/brown mountain mound with dark oval opening at N and S edges
Track rails visible entering/exiting the tunnel openings
Night mode: subtle warm glow around tunnel entrances (via CSS)

tasks.title: Train fade/shrink animation inside tunnel
tasks.description: When train traverses a tunnel cell, it shrinks and fades out over the first 30% of the cell, stays hidden in the middle 40%, then grows and fades back in over the last 30%.
changes: In renderTrainAtProgress(), detect if current cell is a tunnel
Calculate opacity and scale based on progress through tunnel cell
First 30%: opacity goes from 1→0, scale from 1→0.3
Middle 40%: opacity=0, scale=0.3 (fully hidden)
Last 30%: opacity goes from 0→1, scale from 0.3→1
Apply transform scale and opacity to trainEl

tasks.title: Car fade animation inside tunnel
tasks.description: Each car independently fades when entering/exiting tunnel cells, creating a staggered disappearing effect.
changes: In the car rendering section of renderTrainAtProgress(), check if each car's current cell is a tunnel
Apply same fade/shrink logic per car based on their position within the tunnel cell
Cars enter after locomotive, creating a sequential hide/reveal effect

tasks.title: Tunnel sound effects
tasks.description: Whoosh echo on tunnel entry and exit.
changes: Add SFX.tunnelEnter() — breathy whoosh with slight reverb/echo effect
Add SFX.tunnelExit() — lighter ascending whoosh
Trigger tunnelEnter when train enters a tunnel cell
Trigger tunnelExit when train exits a tunnel cell
Track last tunnel state per anim to avoid repeated triggers

tasks.title: Night mode tunnel glow
tasks.description: In night mode, tunnel entrances have a subtle warm glow.
changes: Add CSS rule: body.night-mode .cell tunnel SVG gets subtle amber glow via filter or box-shadow
Or add glow elements in renderCell when piece is tunnel and night mode is active

tasks.title: Integration with existing systems
tasks.description: Ensure tunnel works with auto-connect, random generator, save/load, undo, connection dots.
changes: Auto-connect (findBestRotation) works naturally since tunnel uses standard connections
Tunnel should appear in random generator occasionally (replace a straight section)
Save/load serialization works naturally since it's a grid piece
Connection dots work naturally since BASE_CONNECTIONS defines N-S

acceptance_criteria: AC1: Tunnel appears in palette between Bridge and Station, draggable and placeable on grid
AC2: Tunnel connects N-S at rotation 0, E-W at rotation 90 — connects with adjacent pieces
AC3: Click to rotate tunnel works (0→90→180→270)
AC4: Train disappears (shrink+fade) when entering tunnel, reappears when exiting
AC5: Whoosh sound plays on tunnel entry/exit
AC6: Train cars fade independently when entering tunnel (staggered effect)
AC7: Night mode: tunnel has subtle warm glow at entrances
AC8: Tunnel works with auto-connect, save/load, undo, connection dots
AC9: Random generator occasionally includes tunnels
AC10: Works in both day and night modes
testing_focus: Place tunnel, verify connections with straight and curve pieces
Play train through tunnel — verify fade/shrink/reappear animation
Test with train + cars through tunnel — staggered effect
Rotate tunnel — verify E-W orientation works
Night mode toggle with tunnel on grid
Random generator — verify tunnels appear occasionally
